markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Review client sprint statuses and align on team priorities.](https://fathom.video/share/EGNERK7cGnHTs1LkEtoCyc64LiKXw4F1?tab=summary&timestamp=298.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**BlackSoul Production Blocked:** A production delay in the final sprint week risks a smooth handoff to the growth team. Sydney is coordinating coverage to meet the 5-article/week commitment.](https://fathom.video/share/EGNERK7cGnHTs1LkEtoCyc64LiKXw4F1?tab=summary&timestamp=323.0)
  - [**Critical Client Risks Identified:**](https://fathom.video/share/EGNERK7cGnHTs1LkEtoCyc64LiKXw4F1?tab=summary&timestamp=323.0)
      - [**CRV:** Publishing is on hold for a website rebrand, delaying early wins needed to prove value.](https://fathom.video/share/EGNERK7cGnHTs1LkEtoCyc64LiKXw4F1?tab=summary&timestamp=1493.0)
      - [**Thunstyle:** Persistent artifact issues threaten the client relationship and require a full artifact audit before the handoff to the growth team.](https://fathom.video/share/EGNERK7cGnHTs1LkEtoCyc64LiKXw4F1?tab=summary&timestamp=3483.0)
  - [**Operational Gaps Exposed:** Pre-kickoff assignments are incomplete, and key processes (OOTO docs, Looker setup) are inconsistent, creating unnecessary delays and risks.](https://fathom.video/share/EGNERK7cGnHTs1LkEtoCyc64LiKXw4F1?tab=summary&timestamp=234.0)
  - [**New Client Kickoffs:** Elementum (AI workflow optimization) and SpendDesk (bilingual content) kick off this week, with Elementum's CEO joining to provide a critical product download.](https://fathom.video/share/EGNERK7cGnHTs1LkEtoCyc64LiKXw4F1?tab=summary&timestamp=3078.0)

## Topics

### Client Risks & Mitigation

  - [**BlackSoul (Final Sprint Week):**](https://fathom.video/share/EGNERK7cGnHTs1LkEtoCyc64LiKXw4F1?tab=summary&timestamp=309.0)
      - [**Problem:** Production is delayed, creating a backlog of content from last week and this week.](https://fathom.video/share/EGNERK7cGnHTs1LkEtoCyc64LiKXw4F1?tab=summary&timestamp=323.0)
      - [**Cause:** Natalie (ME) is out sick, and a high volume of client feedback on prior drafts caused delays.](https://fathom.video/share/EGNERK7cGnHTs1LkEtoCyc64LiKXw4F1?tab=summary&timestamp=345.0)
      - [**Risk:** Failing to meet the 5-article/week commitment in the final sprint week could jeopardize a smooth handoff to the growth team.](https://fathom.video/share/EGNERK7cGnHTs1LkEtoCyc64LiKXw4F1?tab=summary&timestamp=375.0)
      - [**Action:** Sydney is coordinating coverage with Panzer to ensure delivery. Aida will update the client, framing the delay as extra time spent perfecting drafts based on their feedback.](https://fathom.video/share/EGNERK7cGnHTs1LkEtoCyc64LiKXw4F1?tab=summary&timestamp=497.0)
  - [**Thunstyle (Final Sprint Week):**](https://fathom.video/share/EGNERK7cGnHTs1LkEtoCyc64LiKXw4F1?tab=summary&timestamp=3483.0)
      - [**Problem:** Persistent artifact issues are resurfacing, including incorrect definitions (e.g., "quote-to-cash").](https://fathom.video/share/EGNERK7cGnHTs1LkEtoCyc64LiKXw4F1?tab=summary&timestamp=3495.0)
      - [**Risk:** These issues threaten the client relationship and the success of the handoff to the growth team.](https://fathom.video/share/EGNERK7cGnHTs1LkEtoCyc64LiKXw4F1?tab=summary&timestamp=3578.0)
      - [**Action:** Ife will conduct a full artifact audit to resolve all lingering issues before the handoff.](https://fathom.video/share/EGNERK7cGnHTs1LkEtoCyc64LiKXw4F1?tab=summary&timestamp=3540.0)
  - [**CRV:**](https://fathom.video/share/EGNERK7cGnHTs1LkEtoCyc64LiKXw4F1?tab=summary&timestamp=1359.0)
      - [**Problem:** Publishing is on hold for a website rebrand.](https://fathom.video/share/EGNERK7cGnHTs1LkEtoCyc64LiKXw4F1?tab=summary&timestamp=1493.0)
      - [**Risk:** This delays early wins, making it harder to prove value and build momentum.](https://fathom.video/share/EGNERK7cGnHTs1LkEtoCyc64LiKXw4F1?tab=summary&timestamp=1493.0)
      - [**Action:** Hassan will get a timeline for the rebrand and push to publish content now, ensuring a seamless migration later.](https://fathom.video/share/EGNERK7cGnHTs1LkEtoCyc64LiKXw4F1?tab=summary&timestamp=1493.0)
      - [**Opportunity:** The client is creating an internal doc to explain the strategy to leadership, which Hassan will review to ensure alignment.](https://fathom.video/share/EGNERK7cGnHTs1LkEtoCyc64LiKXw4F1?tab=summary&timestamp=1390.0)
  - [**NetRix:**](https://fathom.video/share/EGNERK7cGnHTs1LkEtoCyc64LiKXw4F1?tab=summary&timestamp=792.0)
      - [**Problem:** The client's internal review process was a publishing bottleneck.](https://fathom.video/share/EGNERK7cGnHTs1LkEtoCyc64LiKXw4F1?tab=summary&timestamp=881.0)
      - [**Solution:** The client agreed to a "publish first, review later" workflow, removing the blocker.](https://fathom.video/share/EGNERK7cGnHTs1LkEtoCyc64LiKXw4F1?tab=summary&timestamp=881.0)
      - [**Strategy:** Aida will create a 6-week content plan focused on bottom-of-funnel topics to avoid overlap with internal efforts.](https://fathom.video/share/EGNERK7cGnHTs1LkEtoCyc64LiKXw4F1?tab=summary&timestamp=821.0)
      - [**Blocker:** All customer stories/case studies are currently off-limits for use in content.](https://fathom.video/share/EGNERK7cGnHTs1LkEtoCyc64LiKXw4F1?tab=summary&timestamp=2487.0)

### Client Progress & Wins

  - [**Talera:**](https://fathom.video/share/EGNERK7cGnHTs1LkEtoCyc64LiKXw4F1?tab=summary&timestamp=645.0)
      - [**Win:** A published "alternatives to Babel" article is already receiving traffic from ChatGPT, demonstrating early AEO success.](https://fathom.video/share/EGNERK7cGnHTs1LkEtoCyc64LiKXw4F1?tab=summary&timestamp=660.0)
      - **Blocker:** The client is having trouble accessing the shared ChatGPT workspace. Aida has asked for support in the `#ask-checkthat` channel.
  - [**Ramp:**](https://fathom.video/share/EGNERK7cGnHTs1LkEtoCyc64LiKXw4F1?tab=summary&timestamp=602.0)
      - [**Progress:** 3 articles and 4 short posts published last week; same quantity planned for this week.](https://fathom.video/share/EGNERK7cGnHTs1LkEtoCyc64LiKXw4F1?tab=summary&timestamp=602.0)
      - [**Status:** Client (Victoria) is happy with the content.](https://fathom.video/share/EGNERK7cGnHTs1LkEtoCyc64LiKXw4F1?tab=summary&timestamp=602.0)
  - [**Panther:**](https://fathom.video/share/EGNERK7cGnHTs1LkEtoCyc64LiKXw4F1?tab=summary&timestamp=1602.0)
      - [**Context:** A new CMO is focused on pipeline influence and lead generation.](https://fathom.video/share/EGNERK7cGnHTs1LkEtoCyc64LiKXw4F1?tab=summary&timestamp=1648.0)
      - [**Action:** Prioritize bottom-of-funnel content (listicles, comparisons) to align with the new CMO's goals.](https://fathom.video/share/EGNERK7cGnHTs1LkEtoCyc64LiKXw4F1?tab=summary&timestamp=1648.0)
  - [**Perloa:**](https://fathom.video/share/EGNERK7cGnHTs1LkEtoCyc64LiKXw4F1?tab=summary&timestamp=1822.0)
      - [**Status:** Calibration delivered Friday and reviewed by the POC. 3 articles are in progress for this week.](https://fathom.video/share/EGNERK7cGnHTs1LkEtoCyc64LiKXw4F1?tab=summary&timestamp=1822.0)
  - [**Talon1:**](https://fathom.video/share/EGNERK7cGnHTs1LkEtoCyc64LiKXw4F1?tab=summary&timestamp=1909.0)
      - [**Status:** Calibration delivered Friday and is under review.](https://fathom.video/share/EGNERK7cGnHTs1LkEtoCyc64LiKXw4F1?tab=summary&timestamp=1909.0)
      - [**Action:** Production is not blocked. The team is drafting articles from the approved content strategy while awaiting calendar feedback.](https://fathom.video/share/EGNERK7cGnHTs1LkEtoCyc64LiKXw4F1?tab=summary&timestamp=1909.0)
      - [**Process Gap:** The Looker dashboard is not yet set up. Aida will file a Linear ticket.](https://fathom.video/share/EGNERK7cGnHTs1LkEtoCyc64LiKXw4F1?tab=summary&timestamp=2012.0)

### New Client Kickoffs

  - [**Elementum (Kickoff this week):**](https://fathom.video/share/EGNERK7cGnHTs1LkEtoCyc64LiKXw4F1?tab=summary&timestamp=3078.0)
      - [**Context:** An AI workflow optimization platform for enterprise clients.](https://fathom.video/share/EGNERK7cGnHTs1LkEtoCyc64LiKXw4F1?tab=summary&timestamp=3172.0)
      - [**Strategy:** The kickoff is designed to extract information directly from the CEO, as there is minimal existing documentation.](https://fathom.video/share/EGNERK7cGnHTs1LkEtoCyc64LiKXw4F1?tab=summary&timestamp=3084.0)
      - [**KPIs:** Brand awareness is the primary goal, with realistic expectations for pipeline influence over 6 months.](https://fathom.video/share/EGNERK7cGnHTs1LkEtoCyc64LiKXw4F1?tab=summary&timestamp=3271.0)
  - [**SpendDesk (Kickoff this week):**](https://fathom.video/share/EGNERK7cGnHTs1LkEtoCyc64LiKXw4F1?tab=summary&timestamp=3315.0)
      - [**Context:** Requires bilingual content (French/German).](https://fathom.video/share/EGNERK7cGnHTs1LkEtoCyc64LiKXw4F1?tab=summary&timestamp=3315.0)
      - [**Action:** William must source French and German-speaking editors with Panzer's help to ensure production capacity for the growth phase.](https://fathom.video/share/EGNERK7cGnHTs1LkEtoCyc64LiKXw4F1?tab=summary&timestamp=3315.0)

### Operational Improvements

  - [**Pre-Kickoff Assignments:** EM and ME assignments for new clients (SORT Health, JAMA, GIGA) are incomplete.](https://fathom.video/share/EGNERK7cGnHTs1LkEtoCyc64LiKXw4F1?tab=summary&timestamp=234.0)
  - [**Process Gaps Identified:**](https://fathom.video/share/EGNERK7cGnHTs1LkEtoCyc64LiKXw4F1?tab=summary&timestamp=234.0)
      - [**OOTO Docs:** Create a formal template for out-of-office handoffs to ensure consistent coverage.](https://fathom.video/share/EGNERK7cGnHTs1LkEtoCyc64LiKXw4F1?tab=summary&timestamp=2434.0)
      - [**Looker Setup:** Add Looker dashboard creation to the pre-kickoff checklist.](https://fathom.video/share/EGNERK7cGnHTs1LkEtoCyc64LiKXw4F1?tab=summary&timestamp=2012.0)
      - [**KPI Tracking:** Pin client KPIs in project docs to ensure team alignment on success metrics.](https://fathom.video/share/EGNERK7cGnHTs1LkEtoCyc64LiKXw4F1?tab=summary&timestamp=2088.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**Sydney:**](https://fathom.video/share/EGNERK7cGnHTs1LkEtoCyc64LiKXw4F1?tab=summary&timestamp=3389.0)

      - [Work with Tammy to implement the common extractor pipeline in new workspaces.](https://fathom.video/share/EGNERK7cGnHTs1LkEtoCyc64LiKXw4F1?tab=summary&timestamp=507.0)
  - [**Aida:**](https://fathom.video/share/EGNERK7cGnHTs1LkEtoCyc64LiKXw4F1?tab=summary&timestamp=3389.0)
      - [Finalize EM/ME assignments for new clients with Ella.](https://fathom.video/share/EGNERK7cGnHTs1LkEtoCyc64LiKXw4F1?tab=summary&timestamp=279.0)
      - [Update the BlackSoul client on the production status.](https://fathom.video/share/EGNERK7cGnHTs1LkEtoCyc64LiKXw4F1?tab=summary&timestamp=411.0)
      - [Create the 6-week content plan for NetRix.](https://fathom.video/share/EGNERK7cGnHTs1LkEtoCyc64LiKXw4F1?tab=summary&timestamp=821.0)

      - [Review the CRV leadership doc to ensure strategic alignment.](https://fathom.video/share/EGNERK7cGnHTs1LkEtoCyc64LiKXw4F1?tab=summary&timestamp=1390.0)
  - [**Ife:**](https://fathom.video/share/EGNERK7cGnHTs1LkEtoCyc64LiKXw4F1?tab=summary&timestamp=3483.0)
      - [Conduct a full artifact audit for Thunstyle to resolve all persistent issues.](https://fathom.video/share/EGNERK7cGnHTs1LkEtoCyc64LiKXw4F1?tab=summary&timestamp=3483.0)
  - [**Ella:**](https://fathom.video/share/EGNERK7cGnHTs1LkEtoCyc64LiKXw4F1?tab=summary&timestamp=3389.0)
      - [Finalize EM/ME assignments for new clients with Aida.](https://fathom.video/share/EGNERK7cGnHTs1LkEtoCyc64LiKXw4F1?tab=summary&timestamp=279.0)
      - [Monitor Perloa's Slack channel for any urgent issues during William's absence.](https://fathom.video/share/EGNERK7cGnHTs1LkEtoCyc64LiKXw4F1?tab=summary&timestamp=1884.0)
      - [Follow up on the Marcel close-the-loop meeting.](https://fathom.video/share/EGNERK7cGnHTs1LkEtoCyc64LiKXw4F1?tab=summary&timestamp=3459.0)
  - [**Team:**](https://fathom.video/share/EGNERK7cGnHTs1LkEtoCyc64LiKXw4F1?tab=summary&timestamp=3389.0)
      - [Formalize an out-of-office template.](https://fathom.video/share/EGNERK7cGnHTs1LkEtoCyc64LiKXw4F1?tab=summary&timestamp=2434.0)
      - [Add Looker dashboard creation to the pre-kickoff checklist.](https://fathom.video/share/EGNERK7cGnHTs1LkEtoCyc64LiKXw4F1?tab=summary&timestamp=2012.0)
      - [Pin client success KPIs in project docs.](https://fathom.video/share/EGNERK7cGnHTs1LkEtoCyc64LiKXw4F1?tab=summary&timestamp=2088.0)
